requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — MBS Import Conformity, MERA Licensing, and Donor/Lender Procurement
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——MBS进口合格评定、MERA许可证及捐助方/贷款方采购
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——MBS進口合格評定、MERA許可證及捐助方/貸款方採購

summary.en: The Malawi Bureau of Standards (MBS) is the national standards body and operates an import conformity assessment programme (a Pre-Export Verification of Conformity, PVoC-style scheme) for regulated product categories entering Malawi. Solar PV inverters may fall within MBS's regulated import scope depending on current MBS product lists — exporters must verify the current MBS Compulsory Standards list before shipment. Where a product is covered, a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) from an MBS-approved inspection body is required prior to or at importation. MBS standards for PV inverters adopt or reference IEC standards; IEC 62109-1 (General requirements for safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems) and IEC 62109-2 (Particular requirements for inverters) are the applicable IEC safety standards. Additionally, MERA licensing conditions and donor/lender procurement specifications (World Bank, MCC, AfDB) for utility-scale and off-grid projects typically mandate IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from ILAC-accredited laboratories as a precondition for equipment qualification.
summary.zh: 马拉维标准局（MBS）是国家标准机构，对进入马拉维的受监管产品类别实施进口合格评定计划（PVoC式出口前合格验证方案）。太阳能光伏逆变器可能属于MBS受监管进口范围，具体取决于MBS现行产品清单——出口商须在出货前核实现行MBS强制性标准清单。如产品在清单范围内，进口前或进口时须提交MBS认可检验机构出具的合格证书（CoC）。MBS针对光伏逆变器的标准采用或引用IEC标准；IEC 62109-1（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（逆变器特殊要求）是适用的IEC安全标准。此外，MERA许可证条件及公用事业规模和离网项目的捐助方/贷款方采购规格（世界银行、MCC、非洲开发银行）通常要求来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书作为设备资格的前提条件。
summary.zht: 馬拉威標準局（MBS）是國家標準機構，對進入馬拉威的受監管產品類別實施進口合格評定計畫（PVoC式出口前合格驗證方案）。太陽能光伏逆變器可能屬於MBS受監管進口範圍，具體取決於MBS現行產品清單——出口商須在出貨前核實現行MBS強制性標準清單。如產品在清單範圍內，進口前或進口時須提交MBS認可檢驗機構出具的合格證書（CoC）。MBS針對光伏逆變器的標準採用或引用IEC標準；IEC 62109-1（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（逆變器特殊要求）是適用的IEC安全標準。此外，MERA許可證條件及公用事業規模和離網項目的捐助方/貸款方採購規格（世界銀行、MCC、非洲開發銀行）通常要求來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書作為設備資格的前提條件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
MBS (Malawi Bureau of Standards) — import conformity assessment / PVoC-style scheme for regulated product categories
Malawi Bureau of Standards Act — legal basis for MBS compulsory standards
MERA — Malawi Energy Regulatory Authority licensing conditions (equipment standards requirements)

summary.en: China's primary voluntary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), assessed at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. Optional voluntary safety certification is available through CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) or CGC (China General Certification Center). GB/T 37408 shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is a domestic standard — it is not harmonised with IEC 62109, not issued by an MBS-approved inspection body, and not accepted by MBS, MERA, or donor/lender procurement evaluators as equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence. Chinese CQC/CGC voluntary certificates also do not satisfy MBS import conformity or donor-lender IEC evidence requirements for Malawi.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全的主要自愿性标准为GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），由中国CNAS认可实验室进行评估。可通过CQC（中国质量认证中心）或CGC（中国通用认证中心）取得可选自愿安全认证。GB/T 37408在概念层面与IEC 62109-1/-2的安全意图相近，但属于国内标准——未与IEC 62109协调，非MBS认可检验机构出具，不被MBS、MERA或捐助方/贷款方采购评估机构接受为IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据的等效依据。中国CQC/CGC自愿证书同样不满足马拉维的MBS进口合格要求或捐助方/贷款方IEC证据要求。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全的主要自願性標準為GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），由中國CNAS認可實驗室進行評估。可通過CQC（中國質量認證中心）或CGC（中國通用認證中心）取得可選自願安全認證。GB/T 37408在概念層面與IEC 62109-1/-2的安全意圖相近，但屬於國內標準——未與IEC 62109協調，非MBS認可檢驗機構出具，不被MBS、MERA或捐助方/貸款方採購評估機構接受為IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據的等效依據。中國CQC/CGC自願證書同樣不滿足馬拉威的MBS進口合格要求或捐助方/貸款方IEC證據要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC voluntary certification — China Quality Certification Centre (domestic voluntary scheme, not MBS-equivalent)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certificates do not satisfy MBS import conformity requirements, MERA licensing equipment conditions, or donor/lender IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test requirements for Malawi. Exporters must: (a) verify whether the inverter model falls within MBS's current compulsory standards list and, if so, engage an MBS-approved inspection body for a Certificate of Conformity prior to shipment; (b) obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family; (c) confirm MERA equipment standard conditions for the applicable licence type. Existing Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports before submitting equipment documentation for MBS import clearance or donor-funded project procurement.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408安全证书不满足MBS进口合格要求、MERA许可证设备条件或马拉维捐助方/贷款方IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验要求。出口商须：（a）核实逆变器型号是否属于MBS现行强制性标准清单范围，如属于，须在出货前委托MBS认可检验机构出具合格证书；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书；（c）确认适用许可类型的MERA设备标准条件。仅依据GB/T 37408的现有中国安全证书，在提交MBS进口清关或捐助资助项目采购设备文件前，应补充IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408安全證書不滿足MBS進口合格要求、MERA許可證設備條件或馬拉威捐助方/貸款方IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗要求。出口商須：（a）核實逆變器型號是否屬於MBS現行強制性標準清單範圍，如屬於，須在出貨前委託MBS認可檢驗機構出具合格證書；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書；（c）確認適用許可類型的MERA設備標準條件。僅依據GB/T 37408的現有中國安全證書，在提交MBS進口清關或捐助資助項目採購設備文件前，應補充IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告。

mandatory_status.target: MBS import conformity Certificate of Conformity mandatory where inverter falls within current MBS compulsory standards scope; IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence mandatory under donor/lender procurement conditions (World Bank, MCC, AfDB) and expected under MERA licensing for grid-tied projects
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 is a recommended national standard; CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law for domestic market

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy MBS import conformity requirements or donor/lender IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence requirements for Malawi. Verify whether the inverter falls within MBS's current compulsory import standards scope before shipment and engage an MBS-approved inspection body if required. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory before project procurement submission. Verify current MBS compulsory standards list, MBS-approved inspection body list, and MERA equipment standard requirements directly with MBS and MERA before committing to a test programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足马拉维MBS进口合格要求或捐助方/贷款方IEC 62109-1/-2证据要求。出货前须核实逆变器是否属于MBS现行强制性进口标准范围，如需要，须委托MBS认可检验机构。在项目采购提交前，应安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验。在启动测试计划前，请直接向MBS和MERA核实现行MBS强制性标准清单、MBS认可检验机构清单及MERA设备标准要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足馬拉威MBS進口合格要求或捐助方/貸款方IEC 62109-1/-2證據要求。出貨前須核實逆變器是否屬於MBS現行強制性進口標準範圍，如需要，須委託MBS認可檢驗機構。在項目採購提交前，應安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗。在啟動測試計畫前，請直接向MBS和MERA核實現行MBS強制性標準清單、MBS認可檢驗機構清單及MERA設備標準要求。
